diagrams.title: Balanced vs Skewed BST
diagrams.description: Comparison of balanced BST (height log n) vs completely skewed BST (height n) with same number of nodes
elements: Balanced: left and right subtrees roughly equal
Shows 7 nodes in balanced form vs 7 nodes in linear chain
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how tree shape affects height and operation complexity

diagrams.title: BST Search Operation Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step search for key=45 in a sample BST showing comparison path
elements: Show comparison decisions at each node
diagrams.purpose: Understand how search traverses tree and why height matters for time complexity

diagrams.title: BST Deletion Cases
diagrams.description: Three cases of deletion: leaf node, node with one child, node with two children
elements: Case 3: Find in-order successor, swap, delete successor
Show before and after states for each case
diagrams.purpose: Understand deletion complexity and different scenarios
